records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you call, Papa?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you call, Papa?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you call, Papa?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? The atmosphere of your room's changed. Any reason why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? The atmosphere of your room's changed. Any reason why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? The atmosphere of your room's changed. Any reason why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lifetime... contract? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lifetime... contract? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lifetime... contract? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... it's supposed to mean that we'll be together forever...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... it's supposed to mean that we'll be together forever...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... it's supposed to mean that we'll be together forever...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, so you want to have the same relationship that I have with my sister?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, so you want to have the same relationship that I have with my sister?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, so you want to have the same relationship that I have with my sister?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew you were going to propose that, I would've brought her with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew you were going to propose that, I would've brought her with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew you were going to propose that, I would've brought her with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there's something that I must promise? Oh, you're suddenly making a scary face...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there's something that I must promise? Oh, you're suddenly making a scary face...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there's something that I must promise? Oh, you're suddenly making a scary face...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't harm Eva anymore?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't harm Eva anymore?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't harm Eva anymore?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The lifetime contract is to watch over the two of us...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The lifetime contract is to watch over the two of us...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The lifetime contract is to watch over the two of us...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. Oh, my dear sister said nonsense. You see, she and I are inseparable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. Oh, my dear sister said nonsense. You see, she and I are inseparable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. Oh, my dear sister said nonsense. You see, she and I are inseparable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know? What I do to her is because she gave me permission to do so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know? What I do to her is because she gave me permission to do so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know? What I do to her is because she gave me permission to do so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said she wouldn't resist until I felt something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said she wouldn't resist until I felt something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said she wouldn't resist until I felt something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's my sister. Someone who is willing to accept everything about me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's my sister. Someone who is willing to accept everything about me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's my sister. Someone who is willing to accept everything about me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, it's not a lie that I love her... So don't be mistaken or I'll be sad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, it's not a lie that I love her... So don't be mistaken or I'll be sad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, it's not a lie that I love her... So don't be mistaken or I'll be sad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've suddenly become emotional...? Hmm... Have I...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've suddenly become emotional...? Hmm... Have I...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've suddenly become emotional...? Hmm... Have I...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll sign it for now. Because when I look at you, Papa, I get the same emotions that I get with Eva.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll sign it for now. Because when I look at you, Papa, I get the same emotions that I get with Eva.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll sign it for now. Because when I look at you, Papa, I get the same emotions that I get with Eva.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And as promised, I'll be a good little girl in front of you. Haha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And as promised, I'll be a good little girl in front of you. Haha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And as promised, I'll be a good little girl in front of you. Haha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... this contract means that I get something in return, right? What should I ask for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... this contract means that I get something in return, right? What should I ask for?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... this contract means that I get something in return, right? What should I ask for?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufufu... I'll keep thinking about it. Just the three of us... You... Eva... and me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufufu... I'll keep thinking about it. Just the three of us... You... Eva... and me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufufu... I'll keep thinking about it. Just the three of us... You... Eva... and me...
